goal: Configure per-env-per-reset domain randomization over fingertip friction, cube mass, cube COM offset, and obs noise using real IsaacLab event APIs.
thoughts: Use isaaclab.envs.mdp.events real functions (randomize_rigid_body_material, randomize_rigid_body_mass, randomize_body_com). Event mode must be 'reset' (not 'startup') for per-episode change. Ranges should be asymmetric around the real-world prior. randomize_body_com requires a single rigid body — fail-fast if the cube is nested articulated. Python wrapper-based DR serializes on CPU; EventTermCfg runs GPU-side.
code:
# 1. Anchor in real IsaacLab event APIs
lookup_knowledge(query="IsaacLab 2.x events randomize_rigid_body_material randomize_body_com reset mode")

# 2. Confirm cube is single rigid body under each env_N
list_all_prims(root="/World/envs", schema_filter="PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", name_contains="Cube")

# 3. Priors-aware ranges (asymmetric around measured real values)
suggest_dr_ranges(
    params=[
        {"name": "fingertip_static_friction", "prior": "<FRICTION_PRIOR>", "asymmetry": "skew_low"},
        {"name": "cube_mass",                 "prior": "<MASS_PRIOR>",     "asymmetry": "symmetric"},
        {"name": "cube_com_offset",           "prior": 0.0,                  "max_abs": "<COM_MAX>"}
    ]
)

# 4. Wire EventTerms at reset (NOT startup) — correlated so contact physics stays consistent
configure_correlated_dr(
    events=[
        {"name": "friction",  "fn": "randomize_rigid_body_material",
         "mode": "reset", "asset": "<CUBE_ASSET_CFG>",
         "params": {"static_friction_range": ("<MU_S_LO>", "<MU_S_HI>"),
                     "dynamic_friction_range": ("<MU_D_LO>", "<MU_D_HI>")}},
        {"name": "mass",      "fn": "randomize_rigid_body_mass",
         "mode": "reset", "asset": "<CUBE_ASSET_CFG>",
         "params": {"mass_distribution_params": ("<M_LO>", "<M_HI>"), "operation": "abs"}},
        {"name": "com",       "fn": "randomize_body_com",
         "mode": "reset", "asset": "<CUBE_ASSET_CFG>",
         "params": {"com_range": {"x": ("<CX_LO>", "<CX_HI>"), "y": ("<CY_LO>", "<CY_HI>"), "z": (0.0, 0.0)}}}
    ]
)

# 5. Dry-run visualize a few resets before training
preview_dr(num_samples=8)

# 6. Confirm the material prim actually received the API per-env
run_usd_script(script="""
from pxr import UsdShade, UsdPhysics
stage = omni.usd.get_context().get_stage()
for p in stage.Traverse():
    if p.GetPath().pathString.endswith('Cube/geom') and p.HasAPI(UsdPhysics.MaterialAPI):
        print(p.GetPath(), 'has MaterialAPI')
""")
failure_modes: EventTerm mode='startup' never re-randomizes — only 'reset' fires per episode
randomize_body_com on a nested articulation silently no-ops on children
Symmetric ranges around a biased real prior widen sim-real gap, not shrink it
gym.Wrapper-based DR serializes on CPU, defeating 4096 parallel envs
